summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cross-Skill Scheduler Excel (.xlsx) support and project-specific shifts. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend fully functional with all Excel features, project-specific shifts (English: E05-E20, Language: L07-L11), and enhanced UI components.

design_issues.issue: SLA table column headers may not match exact expected format but functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Default requirements data retrieval
Sample template download (.xlsx format)
Excel file upload processing
Project-specific shifts validation (9 English: E05-E20, 5 Language: L07-L11)
Schedule generation with 212 agents and 14 shifts
Excel export for all types (shiftwise, roster, gap, sla)
Home page loads with .xlsx support clearly displayed
Download Sample Template (.xlsx) button triggers download
Run Greedy Scheduler without files uses defaults and produces results
Summary cards show correct values: Total Agents (212), English Shifts (486), Language Shifts (574), Avg SLA (96.2%)
Tab navigation works for all 4 tabs (Shiftwise, Gap Dashboard, Agent Roster, SLA Analysis)
Shiftwise tab: Shows all English shifts (E05-E20) + Language shifts (L07-L11) + subtotals + grand total
Shiftwise tab: Two bar charts render correctly for English and Language shifts
Gap Dashboard tab: Day selector + Project filter (Combined/English/Language) works
Gap Dashboard tab: Area chart and gap table update when switching day/project
Agent Roster tab: 212 agents with pagination (25 per page), search by agent ID works
SLA Analysis tab: Daily SLA table with English, Language, Combined data
SLA Analysis tab: Hourly coverage chart shows day-specific data
Export .xlsx buttons on each tab are present and labeled correctly
New Schedule button resets view to upload panel
